description: Single paid claim. Rep verifies identity then gives full payment details.
scripted_rep_turns: Thanks for calling provider services, this is the claims line. Can I get your provider NPI?
Got it. And the member ID for the patient?
And the patient's date of birth?
What was the date of service?
Okay, I see that claim. It was processed and paid. We paid 1,100 dollars on January 25th, and it went out as EFT number 88432.
You're welcome! My name is Sarah, and your reference number is REF-2025-0456.
